name: Frozen Maple Walnut Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until lemon-colored.
2. Add salt and maple syrup to the yolks. Cook in a double boiler until the yolk mixture thickens.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Using a folding motion, combine the maple syrup mixture with the beaten egg whites.
6. Fold in 2/3 of the Kool-Aid Whip and 1 cup of chopped walnut meats.
7. Scrape the mixture into the baked pie shell.
8. Cover with the remaining whipped topping.
9. Sprinkle the remaining chopped walnut meats and chocolate shavings on top.
10. Refrigerate for at least four hours before serving.
